mapper.sql: a.id, a.user_id, a.content, a.image_urls, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.quote_count, a.is_top, a.top_time, a.quote_ref_type, a.quote_ref_id, a.created_at, a.updated_at, a.status, IFNULL(m.idno, '') AS user_idno, IFNULL(m.nickname, '') AS user_nickname
mapper.select: select count(1) from t_piamom_moment a left join t_member m on m.id = a.user_id
select from t_piamom_moment a left join t_member m on m.id = a.user_id where a.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update t_piamom_moment set is_top = #{isTop}, top_time = case when #{isTop} = 1 then now() else null end, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update t_piamom_moment set status = 0, is_top = 0, top_time = null, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
